summary: Planning is complete for GitHub issue #5. Implement a dependency-free KontourEmitter, LocalFileSink, CompositeSink, and InMemorySink in the CommonJS console foundation package, with local .kontour event/projection writes and per-sink delivery results preserving required recordId semantics.
next_steps: Use .agents/flow-agents/implement-local-composite-sink-skeleton/implement-local-composite-sink-skeleton--plan-work-plan.md as the implementation source of truth.
Add the emitter/sink module under src/console-foundation/ and re-export from src/console-foundation/index.js.

Add tests for composite event fanout, local projection loader compatibility, simulated sink failure result shape, path safety, projection identity not based on generatedAt, and action descriptor inertness.
Update README.md with local plus future API fanout usage, making clear no API sink is implemented.
Verify with npm test, npm run inspect:fixtures, forbidden API scan, and generatedAt identity review.
warnings: Do not implement HTTP/API, OTLP, product adapters, background retries, auth, hosted ingestion, UI, or action execution.
LocalFileSink must sanitize path tokens and verify resolved paths stay under the configured .kontour root.
Delivery results must include recordId for every sink result, including failures.
Projection identity must not use generatedAt as the dedupe key or filename identity.
Generic sinks must persist action descriptors only as inert data and must not open URLs, fetch endpoints, or run commands.
